response.original_title: あぶない通勤電車 指先職人にご用心
response.overview: Shoko, an English instructor raised in America, was rescued from a pervert on a train by a tall man. That night, when she told her boyfriend, Imoto, about it, he made a shocking confession: "I was arrested for molestation a month ago, lost my job, and am now separated from my wife and children." Arrested for molestation? Married with children? Shoko was shocked…
response.title: あぶない通勤電車 指先職人にご用心
